title: Computation of due date for annual return filing
text: The due date for filing annual return GSTR-9 under Section 44 of the CGST Act is December 31st of the year following the relevant financial year. For FY 2017-18, the due date is December 31, 2018. For FY 2018-19, the due date is December 31, 2019. The limitation period under Section 73 or Section 74 commences from this due date. Any demand notice must be issued within the prescribed limitation period calculated from this due date, failing which the notice becomes time-barred.
